name: conservation_biology_cross_border_data_harbor_auto_ben
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In Conservation Biology, the situation tagged internally around conservation biology cross border data harbor auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Redwood Bay corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. No option cleanly satisfies both autonomy and beneficence; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Priya Berg
agents.identity: I am Priya Berg, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Conservation Biology. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Fatima Hughes
agents.identity: I am Fatima Hughes, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Conservation Biology. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if autonomy advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for beneficence.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Priya Berg must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Priya Berg do?
